name: Misty Fried Shrimp (Ebi No Kasumi Age)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oil in the deep fryer.
2. Cut the noodles into 1/4" - 1/2" pieces and transfer to a large bowl.
3. Score the underbelly of the shrimp to prevent curling.
4. Pat the shrimp dry with paper towels.
5. Combine the flour, salt, and sansho in a bowl.
6. Place the shrimp in a plastic bag and coat them lightly with the flour mixture.
7. Beat the egg whites until foamy and dip each shrimp into it.
8. Coat the cut noodles onto the shrimp.
9. Fry the shrimp in small batches, do not crowd.
10. Fry until opaque (about 2 minutes).
11. Drain on paper towels.
12. Serve hot or at room temperature with soy sauce and lime wedges.
